testcase.name: testPitchClassSequenceSubSequence
testcase.system-out: Using index = 0, length = 9 First seq: <>, Second seq: <0 4 6 3 2 5 8 1 7> Using index = 1, length = 8 First seq: <0>, Second seq: <4 6 3 2 5 8 1 7> Using index = 2, length = 7 First seq: <0 4>, Second seq: <6 3 2 5 8 1 7> Using index = 3, length = 6 First seq: <0 4 6>, Second seq: <3 2 5 8 1 7> Using index = 4, length = 5 First seq: <0 4 6 3>, Second seq: <2 5 8 1 7> Using index = 5, length = 4 First seq: <0 4 6 3 2>, Second seq: <5 8 1 7> Using index = 6, length = 3 First seq: <0 4 6 3 2 5>, Second seq: <8 1 7> Using index = 7, length = 2 First seq: <0 4 6 3 2 5 8>, Second seq: <1 7>
